form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.21) when fifth over 350m at Grafton in a NG. Strong record off the draw with two wins and two minors from five starts. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (20.21) when fifth over 350m at Grafton in a NG. Strong record off the draw with two wins and two minors from five starts. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together shortly after the start and fell; Finished the event.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished last over 350m at Grafton beaten 9 lengths (20.80) behind Sheezel in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 12. Didn't show up last start but give him another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished last over 350m at Grafton beaten 9 lengths (20.80) behind Sheezel in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 12. Didn't show up last start but give him another chance.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.21) in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing a 3 length fifth. Goes very well off the draw boasting six wins and four places from 15 starts. Among the chances on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.21) in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing a 3 length fifth. Goes very well off the draw boasting six wins and four places from 15 starts. Among the chances on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Momentarily encountered the rail just prior to the finish.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 350m at Grafton beaten 4.5 lengths (20.29) behind Nitro Slim in a Mix 2/3 on April 14. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 350m at Grafton beaten 4.5 lengths (20.29) behind Nitro Slim in a Mix 2/3 on April 14. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn, shifted wide and collided..

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.25 lengths fourth (17.17) over 300m at this track. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.25 lengths fourth (17.17) over 300m at this track. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 5.5 lengths fourth over 411m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 5.5 lengths fourth over 411m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame when third (20.49) over 350m at Grafton. Has a solid record from out wide and is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame when third (20.49) over 350m at Grafton. Has a solid record from out wide and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.94) at this track in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Has three wins and three placings from 12 starts from the draw. Has ability and looks a key chance.
